about.board.body: Fælled United is run by volunteer parents and engaged citizens who are all passionate about children's sport in Copenhagen.
about.cta.body: Sign up your child, or get in touch with us - we are always happy to have a chat.
about.history.p1: Fælled United was founded by a group of dedicated parents with a simple vision: to create a safe and inclusive environment where children can enjoy sport and grow as people - not just as athletes.
about.history.p2: We are a volunteer-run club, and everything we do is done with love for the community. Our coaches, board members and helpers give their free time because they believe that sport gives children something for life.
about.history.p3: Today we offer football and handball for children from the youngest age groups up to youth teams, and we grow every year. Whether your child dreams of playing at the national level or just wants to have fun with friends, there is room for everyone at Fælled United.

footer.tagline:
More than a club - a family.
Football and handball for children in Copenhagen.
home.about.body: Fælled United is a diverse and inclusive sports club in the heart of Copenhagen. We offer football and handball for children and young people of all ages, and we believe that sport is much more than just playing ball - it is about community, friendships and joy. Whether your child is an experienced player or completely new to sport, everyone is welcome with us.
home.cta.body: Sign up your child today and become part of the Fælled United family.
mailing.contact.body: Get club news and updates straight to your inbox.
mailing.homepage.body: Get news and updates from Fælled United straight to your inbox. No spam - just the important stuff.
reg.gdpr_consent: I agree that Fælled United may process the above personal data for registration purposes.
reg.gdpr_consent_error: You must read and accept the privacy policy to continue.
reg.photo_consent: I give permission for the club to use photos of the child for club communications (website, social media).
reg.subtitle: Fill in the form below to sign up your child
reg.success: Thank you for registering! We look forward to welcoming :name. We will be in touch as soon as possible at :email.
start_dept_para_1: Fælled United is an open and growing club, and we are always interested in expanding with new sports. If you have an idea for a new department and believe there are enough interested families, we would love to hear from you.
start_dept_para_2: Whether it is basketball, tennis, cycling or something else entirely - we believe sport brings people together. A new department always starts with one person with a good idea and the desire to make a difference for children in Copenhagen.
start_dept_para_3: Get in touch with the board, and let us have a no-obligation chat about the possibilities. We are happy to help you get started.
teams.coming_soon.body: We are setting up the teams. Sign up now, and we will contact you when we are ready.
value.community: We are stronger together. Everyone is welcome with us, regardless of background and level.
value.development: We help each child grow - as an athlete and as a person.
value.joy: Sport should be fun. Joy of the game is our foundation.
